about.title: About
about.what: Myizam is an open assistant for the legislation of the Kyrgyz Republic. Ask a question in Kyrgyz, Russian, or English — get an answer in plain language with references to specific articles of specific codes.
about.how1: Your question is searched across 3,400+ articles of eight KR codes (vector search).
about.how2: Found articles are re-ranked by a neural model; the best go into the context.
about.how3: The language model answers strictly from the retrieved articles, marking sources [1].
about.how4: Each answer is checked by our own hallucination detector (RagGuard) before display.
about.disclaimerFull: This is reference information, not legal advice. The assistant can make mistakes; always verify answers against the original source — links to official article texts appear under every answer. For legal matters, consult a lawyer.
about.ragguardNote: the first hallucination detector for the Kyrgyz language
